entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 80
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS AROUND 50

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
